title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photographs and answer the examiner's questions.

tasks.instructions: Look at the photograph and describe what you can see.

images.label: A
images.description: A student studying alone at a desk with books and a laptop.
images.imagePrompt: A student studying alone at a desk with books and a laptop. Natural realistic exam-style photography, educational speaking exam image, clear details, realistic lighting, medium shot.

followUp.question: Would you enjoy studying like this? Why or why not?

tasks.instructions: Look at the photograph and describe what you can see.

images.label: B
images.description: A teenager playing basketball in an outdoor court after school.
images.imagePrompt: A teenager playing basketball in an outdoor court after school. Natural realistic exam-style photography, educational speaking exam image, clear details, realistic lighting, medium shot.

followUp.question: Do you think doing sport is popular with young people? Why?
